description: Lente de Delivery: dependencias, ambientes, owners, timing, rollout y roadmap.

checks.description: Dependencies, environments, ownership, timing, or rollout constraints are not explicit.
checks.why: Sin dependencias ni owners no hay plan de entrega realista.
